description_long: This is a modern, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from light-colored wood or wood laminate, featuring three spacious drawers stacked vertically. The front of each drawer is flat and handleless, with a recessed groove at the top edge for pulling, giving the cabinet a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, with the back panel being a single, uninterrupted surface. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing office supplies or small equipment. The cabinet sits directly on the ground with a minimal base, and there are no visible wheels or feet. Its clean lines and neutral finish make it suitable for a variety of urban environments, such as offices, reception areas, or administrative spaces.
description: A light wood filing cabinet with three handleless drawers and a minimalist, modern design. The cabinet features flat surfaces and recessed drawer grooves for a sleek appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wide, flat drawers with recessed grooves for opening.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted wood panel and the profile of the recessed drawer grooves.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, flat wood panel and no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the smooth side panel and drawer grooves.
